extracted_text: In reality, as ALBERT SANIGER, the defendant, well knew, nate was not powered by advanced AI technology that would differentiate it from other e-commerce businesses. Instead, the transactions processed through nate were, at times, manually completed by contractors in the Philippines and Romania and, at other times, completed by bots. Despite SANIGER's knowledge of the company's reliance on overseas workers, and its continued inability to successfully process transactions using AI, SANIGER continued to portray nate as fully automated and scalable.
